scenario.mondo-contemporaneo.name: Contemporary World
scenario.mondo-contemporaneo.description: An alternate 2026. Thirty real nations spread across six continents, from superpowers to mid-tier players, balanced precariously between cooperation and competition. Pick a rising nation and push it to the top of the global ranking. A scenario fictionalised for gameplay: nations and settings draw on the real world, but characters, events, and choices do not represent real people, political positions, or faithful historical accounts.

tech.mc.civil.smart_grid.name: Smart electrical grid
tech.mc.civil.smart_grid.description: Distributed sensors and adaptive load management cut waste and stabilise national power consumption.
tech.mc.civil.renewables.name: Renewable energy mix
tech.mc.civil.renewables.description: Industrial-scale solar, wind, and storage reduce dependence on fossil fuels and score points with the public.
tech.mc.civil.high_speed_rail.name: High-speed rail
tech.mc.civil.high_speed_rail.descriptio: A modern network connects the major metropolitan areas: GDP and productivity climb.
tech.mc.civil.ai_infrastructure.name: AI infrastructure
tech.mc.civil.ai_infrastructure.descript: Data centres, GPUs, and national models: the tech sector accelerates and research finds a new engine.
tech.mc.civil.carbon_capture.name: Carbon capture
tech.mc.civil.carbon_capture.description: Industrial plants sequester CO₂: public support rises and a new export of environmental services emerges.
tech.mc.civil.precision_agriculture.name: Precision agriculture
tech.mc.civil.precision_agriculture.desc: Drones, sensors, and big data lift agricultural yields without expanding cultivated land.
tech.mc.civil.universal_healthcare.name: Modern universal healthcare
tech.mc.civil.universal_healthcare.descr: Broad, digitised health coverage: the government's popularity rises and lower-income groups breathe.
tech.mc.civil.circular_economy.name: Circular economy
tech.mc.civil.circular_economy.descripti: Aggressive industrial recycling, reuse, and modular design: GDP rises and reformers cheer.
tech.mc.civil.biotech_revolution.name: Biotech revolution
tech.mc.civil.biotech_revolution.descrip: Gene therapy, synthetic agriculture, and new biological materials open an entirely new industry.
tech.mc.civil.arctic_logistics.name: Arctic logistics
tech.mc.civil.arctic_logistics.descripti: New polar trade routes opened by climate change cut long-haul shipping costs.
tech.mc.civil.education_reform.name: Education reform
tech.mc.civil.education_reform.descripti: Updated curricula, vocational pathways, and university research: the science engine spins faster.
tech.mc.military.modern_doctrine.name: Modern military doctrine
tech.mc.military.modern_doctrine.descrip: Lean chain of command, joint training, and multi-domain operations: the armed forces become more responsive.
tech.mc.military.drone_swarms.name: Drone swarms
tech.mc.military.drone_swarms.descriptio: Coordinated autonomous drones multiply low-cost air firepower.
tech.mc.military.naval_modernization.des: Stealth frigates, anti-submarine systems, and next-generation naval logistics strengthen the fleet.
tech.mc.military.hypersonics.name: Hypersonic missiles
tech.mc.military.hypersonics.description: Vehicles exceeding Mach 5 change engagement doctrine: strike first, negotiate later.
tech.mc.military.integrated_command.name: Integrated command
tech.mc.military.integrated_command.desc: Command-and-control systems unify land, air, and naval operations in real time.
tech.mc.military.missile_defense.name: Missile defence
tech.mc.military.missile_defense.descrip: Layered interception networks shield national territory from short- and medium-range threats.
tech.mc.military.special_forces.name: Advanced special forces
tech.mc.military.special_forces.descript: Elite operators with cross-trained intelligence and military skills lift both doctrine and the agent count.
tech.mc.military.unmanned_naval.name: Unmanned naval units
tech.mc.military.unmanned_naval.descript: Autonomous patrol craft and submarines watch the coasts without exposing personnel.
tech.mc.military.logistics_ai.name: AI military logistics
tech.mc.military.logistics_ai.descriptio: Predictive algorithms manage supply and maintenance: the army holds up better over the long haul.
tech.mc.military.armored_vehicles.name: Modern armoured vehicles
tech.mc.military.armored_vehicles.descri: A new generation of tracked vehicles boosts the impact of ground units.
tech.mc.intel.cyber_defense.name: Cyber defence
tech.mc.intel.cyber_defense.description: 24/7 operations centres and zero-trust protocols make foreign intrusions much harder.
tech.mc.intel.signals_modern.name: Modern signals intelligence
tech.mc.intel.signals_modern.description: Satellite stations and automatic flow analysis unlock targeted propaganda operations.
tech.mc.intel.quantum_crypto.name: Quantum cryptography
tech.mc.intel.quantum_crypto.description: Quantum key distribution: state communications become essentially unbreakable.
tech.mc.intel.offensive_cyber.name: Offensive cyber
tech.mc.intel.offensive_cyber.descriptio: Attack capability against hostile infrastructure: unlocks targeted sabotage operations.
tech.mc.intel.deepfake_response.name: Deepfake response
tech.mc.intel.deepfake_response.descript: Verification and debunking systems protect public discourse: domestic consensus holds up better.
tech.mc.intel.satellite_recon.name: Satellite reconnaissance
tech.mc.intel.satellite_recon.descriptio: A constellation of spy satellites returns near-real-time high-resolution imagery of the planet.
tech.mc.intel.human_networks.name: Human intelligence networks
tech.mc.intel.human_networks.description: Recruitment, handling, and protection of human assets: unlocks the destabilisation operation.
tech.mc.intel.aml_finance.name: Anti-money-laundering finance
tech.mc.intel.aml_finance.description: Tracking illicit financial flows: tax revenue rises and adversaries struggle to operate.
tech.mc.intel.predictive_analytics.name: Predictive analytics
tech.mc.intel.predictive_analytics.descr: Models that anticipate crises and adversary moves: science and internal defence both benefit.
tech.mc.space.orbital_launch.name: National orbital launch
tech.mc.space.orbital_launch.description: Sovereign launch capability enables independent science and commercial missions.
tech.mc.space.communications.name: Satellite communications
tech.mc.space.communications.description: A proprietary telecoms satellite network expands digital trade and research.
tech.mc.space.reusable_rockets.name: Reusable rockets
tech.mc.space.reusable_rockets.descripti: Reusable boosters slash cost-per-kilogram to orbit: the tech sector explodes.
tech.mc.space.lunar_program.name: Lunar programme
tech.mc.space.lunar_program.description: A crewed lunar mission delivers national pride and a new generation of scientists.
tech.mc.space.orbital_factory.name: Orbital factory
tech.mc.space.orbital_factory.descriptio: Microgravity manufacturing of alloys and pharmaceuticals impossible on Earth: a new industrial sector.
tech.mc.space.quantum_computing.name: Quantum computing
tech.mc.space.quantum_computing.descript: The first useful quantum processors unlock simulations and optimisations that change research.
tech.mc.space.deep_space_net.name: Deep space network
tech.mc.space.deep_space_net.description: A global network of antennas communicates with probes and missions millions of kilometres away.
tech.mc.space.fusion_research.name: Fusion research
tech.mc.space.fusion_research.descriptio: The first net-positive fusion reactors promise abundant energy: GDP and confidence in the future rise.
tech.mc.space.ai_research_assistants.des: Dedicated scientific models accelerate discovery and validation in every lab in the country.
tech.mc.space.mars_mission.name: Mars mission
tech.mc.space.mars_mission.description: The first crewed mission to Mars. The moment that defines a century.
tech.mc.space.mars_colony.name: Permanent Mars colony
tech.mc.space.mars_colony.description: A self-sustaining colony on the Red Planet: humanity becomes interplanetary.
era.mc.info-age.name: Information Age
era.mc.space-age.name: New Space Age
era.mc.post-scarcity.name: Post-scarcity Era
event.mc.economy.global_inflation.name: Global inflation
event.mc.economy.global_inflation.descri: G20 central banks signal price pressure. The government must choose how to stabilise the domestic economy.
event.mc.economy.supply_chain_break.name: Supply chain disruption
event.mc.economy.supply_chain_break.desc: A key logistical hub goes down and half of national industry slows. The problem needs a structural answer.
event.mc.climate.summit.name: Climate summit
event.mc.climate.summit.description: A new global climate conference opens. Delegations want concrete commitments; industry wants caution.
event.mc.climate.drought.name: Prolonged drought
event.mc.climate.drought.description: An anomalous drought hits agricultural regions. Local councils and unions are asking for action.
event.mc.cyber.breach.name: Cyber intrusion
event.mc.cyber.breach.description: A cyber intrusion hits key ministries. The exfiltrated data looks significant and attribution points to a state actor.
event.mc.tech.breakthrough.name: Technology breakthrough
event.mc.tech.breakthrough.description: A national consortium announces a breakthrough in a frontier area. The question is what to do with it.
event.mc.diplomacy.trade_war.name: Tariff escalation
event.mc.diplomacy.trade_war.description: Reciprocal tariffs and duties pile up between the great powers. Time to pick a side, and how forcefully.
event.mc.diplomacy.summit_invite.name: Multilateral summit invitation
event.mc.diplomacy.summit_invite.descrip: An allied capital proposes a small leaders' summit. Going has costs; not going has political costs.
event.mc.intel.spy_caught.name: Agent caught abroad
event.mc.intel.spy_caught.description: One of our operatives is intercepted in a sensitive country. Footage is already on the news.
event.mc.politics.confidence_vote.name: Confidence vote
event.mc.politics.confidence_vote.descri: The parliamentary majority is wobbling. Leadership must decide how to reconsolidate the political picture.
event.mc.social.border_pressure.name: Border pressure
event.mc.social.border_pressure.descript: Arrivals at the northern borders exceed the capacity of local authorities. A policy line has to be set.
event.mc.economy.currency_panic.name: Currency market panic
event.mc.economy.currency_panic.descript: The national currency is under pressure. International creditors are calling and markets are watching.
event.mc.climate.storm.name: Extreme weather event
event.mc.climate.storm.description: A series of storms devastates a coastal region. The government must decide how much to spend on rebuilding.
event.mc.climate.storm.choice.minimal: Minimal response to spare the budget
event.mc.intel.leaked_documents.name: Classified leak
event.mc.intel.leaked_documents.descript: A newspaper publishes documents that embarrass the government. The source is internal.
event.mc.diplomacy.alliance_offer.name: Strategic partnership offer
event.mc.diplomacy.alliance_offer.descri: With global tension rising, two powers separately propose a closer strategic partnership.
event.mc.economy.sovereign_fund.name: Sovereign wealth fund
event.mc.economy.sovereign_fund.descript: A budget surplus allows feeding a sovereign wealth fund. The question is where to direct the investments.
event.mc.military.arms_export.name: Arms export request
event.mc.military.arms_export.descriptio: A regional ally requests a large order of weapons systems we manufacture. The decision will be loud either way.
event.mc.space.launch_success.name: Successful space launch
event.mc.space.launch_success.descriptio: The national space agency celebrates a flawless launch. Press coverage is everywhere.
event.mc.social.strikes.name: Wave of strikes
event.mc.social.strikes.description: The unions call a national mobilisation. Dialogue is still possible, but the government must pick a tone.
event.mc.diplomacy.sanctions_debate.name: Debate on new sanctions
event.mc.diplomacy.sanctions_debate.desc: Allies propose a new sanctions package against a problematic country. Time to decide whether to sign.
event.mc.intel.disinfo_campaign.name: Disinformation campaign
event.mc.intel.disinfo_campaign.descript: A coordinated campaign of fake accounts is trying to polarise domestic discourse. Analysts want a response.
event.mc.economy.tech_unicorn.name: A tech unicorn is born
event.mc.economy.tech_unicorn.descriptio: A national startup crosses the billion-dollar valuation mark. The government can support it or let it fly alone.
event.mc.diplomacy.climate_lawsuit.name: International climate lawsuit
event.mc.diplomacy.climate_lawsuit.descr: A group of island nations brings the major emitters before an international court. Our country is named among the parties.
event.mc.military.naval_incident.name: High-seas naval incident
event.mc.military.naval_incident.descrip: One of our vessels comes dangerously close to a foreign fleet in contested international waters.
event.mc.opportunity.research_grant.name: International research grant
event.mc.opportunity.research_grant.desc: A large international consortium opens a research call. Joining gives access to resources and know-how.
victory.mc.economic.name: Economic victory
victory.mc.economic.description: Lift your country's GDP into the top three world economies. Realistically reachable for a rising mid-power.
victory.mc.military.name: Military victory
victory.mc.military.description: Exert control over at least eight nations through alliances, vassalage, or conquest.
victory.mc.scientific.name: Scientific victory
victory.mc.scientific.description: Complete the crewed mission to Mars: the greatest scientific achievement of the century.
victory.mc.diplomatic.name: Diplomatic victory
victory.mc.diplomatic.description: Build an alliance network covering at least 50% of the remaining nations.
victory.mc.domination.name: World dominion
victory.mc.domination.description: Exert control over at least fifteen nations: half the planet answers to you.
difficulty.easy.name: Easy
difficulty.normal.name: Normal
difficulty.hard.name: Hard
bloc.mc.western.name: Western Alliance
bloc.mc.eastern.name: Eastern Axis
bloc.mc.non-aligned.name: Non-Aligned Movement
un.mc.peacekeeping.title: Peacekeeping mission in the contested region
un.mc.peacekeeping.description: A proposal to deploy blue helmets to areas affected by the conflict and contain further escalation.
un.mc.condemnation.tactical.title: Condemnation of tactical-grade weaponry
un.mc.condemnation.tactical.description: Formal condemnation of the use of tactical nuclear arms and call for an immediate moratorium.
un.mc.condemnation.strategic.title: Condemnation of strategic strike
un.mc.condemnation.strategic.description: Emergency session to condemn the strategic strike and weigh collective retaliatory measures.
un.mc.humanitarian.title: Humanitarian aid programme
un.mc.humanitarian.description: Coordinated support for populations facing poverty, disasters or regional tensions.
un.mc.condemnation.sanctions.title: Condemnation of unilateral sanctions
un.mc.condemnation.sanctions.description: Motion examining the legitimacy of imposed economic sanctions and their impact on civilians.
un.mc.climate.tension.title: Global de-escalation pact
un.mc.climate.tension.description: Multilateral framework to lower international tension and head off cascading crises.
un.mc.climate.periodic.title: Periodic climate accord
un.mc.climate.periodic.description: Update of the climate treaty with new binding emission-reduction targets.
